---
title: "Teaching"
---

<br>

```{r out.width = "50%", fig.align = "center", echo = FALSE}
#knitr::include_graphics("Social.jpg")
```

<br>

## Courses

I will be teaching [causal inference](https://catalog.registrar.uiowa.edu/courses/bios/) in Spring 2023 in the Department of Biostatistics at the University of Iowa.
